defs: One that is connected with a lake or lakes, as in habitation, toil, etc.:
One of the poets of the Lake school. See Lake poets, under Lake, n.
A fish living in, or taken from, a lake, esp. the namaycush.
A lake steamer or canal boat.
quotes: The bridge tender . . . thought the Cowies “a little mite” longer than that laker.
